mapper.select: /* UserStatisticsMapper.selectCategoryTotalList */ SELECT A.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName ,COALESCE(SUM(B.AMOUNT), 0) AS totalAmount FROM CATEGORY_CODE A LEFT JOIN TB_HOME_LEDGER_INFO B ON A.CATEGORY_CODE = B.CATEGORY_CODE AND B.MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND B.INOUT_TYPE = 'E' AND B.TRAN_DATE BETWEEN #{categoryBeginDe} AND #{categoryEndDe} AND B.DEL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY A.CATEGORY_CODE ORDER BY A.CATEGORY_CODE

/* UserStatisticsMapper.selectSpendingTotalList */ SELECT A.YEAR_MONTH AS yearMonth ,COALESCE(SUM(B.AMOUNT), 0) AS totalAmount FROM DUMMY_DATE A LEFT JOIN TB_HOME_LEDGER_INFO B ON A.YEAR_MONTH = DATE_FORMAT(B.TRAN_DATE, '%Y-%m') AND B.MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND B.INOUT_TYPE = 'E' AND B.OVER_SPENDING_YN = 'Y' AND B.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE LEFT(A.YEAR_MONTH, 4) = #{spendingYear} GROUP BY A.YEAR_MONTH ORDER BY A.YEAR_MONTH

/* UserStatisticsMapper.selectInoutTotalList */ SELECT A.YEAR_MONTH AS yearMonth ,CASE WHEN B.INOUT_TYPE = 'I' THEN '수입' ELSE '지출' END AS inoutType ,COALESCE(SUM(C.AMOUNT), 0) AS totalAmount FROM DUMMY_DATE A CROSS JOIN ( SELECT 'I' AS INOUT_TYPE UNION ALL SELECT 'E' ) B LEFT JOIN TB_HOME_LEDGER_INFO C ON A.YEAR_MONTH = DATE_FORMAT(C.TRAN_DATE, '%Y-%m') AND B.INOUT_TYPE = C.INOUT_TYPE AND C.MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND C.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE LEFT(A.YEAR_MONTH, 4) = #{inoutYear} GROUP BY A.YEAR_MONTH, B.INOUT_TYPE ORDER BY A.YEAR_MONTH, B.INOUT_TYPE

/* UserStatisticsMapper.selectCategoryList */ SELECT A.TRAN_DATE AS tranDate ,FORMAT(A.AMOUNT, 0) AS amount ,B.AI_NM AS aiNm ,CASE WHEN B.AI_SE = 'B' THEN '통장' ELSE '카드' END AS aiSe ,CASE WHEN A.INOUT_TYPE = 'I' THEN '수입' ELSE '지출' END AS inoutType ,CASE WHEN B.AI_SE = 'B' THEN (SELECT BK.BANK_NAME FROM BANK_CODE BK WHERE BK.BANK_CODE = B.AI_CODE) ELSE (SELECT CC.CARD_NAME FROM CARD_CODE CC WHERE CC.CARD_CODE = B.AI_CODE) END AS aiCode ,CASE WHEN B.AI_SE = 'B' THEN '통장' WHEN B.CARD_TYPE = 'C' THEN '신용' ELSE '체크' END AS cardType FROM TB_HOME_LEDGER_INFO A LEFT JOIN TB_ACCOUNT_INFO B ON A.MEMBER_ID = B.MEMBER_ID AND A.AI_SEQ = B.AI_SEQ AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN CATEGORY_CODE C ON A.CATEGORY_CODE = C.CATEGORY_CODE WHERE A.MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND A.TRAN_DATE BETWEEN #{beginDe} AND #{endDe} AND A.INOUT_TYPE = 'E' AND A.OVER_SPENDING_YN = 'Y' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND C.CATEGORY_NAME = #{categoryName} ORDER BY A.TRAN_DATE

/* UserStatisticsMapper.selectSpendingList */ SELECT A.TRAN_DATE AS tranDate ,FORMAT(A.AMOUNT, 0) AS amount ,B.AI_NM AS aiNm ,CASE WHEN B.AI_SE = 'B' THEN '통장' ELSE '카드' END AS aiSe ,CASE WHEN A.INOUT_TYPE = 'I' THEN '수입' ELSE '지출' END AS inoutType ,CASE WHEN B.AI_SE = 'B' THEN (SELECT BK.BANK_NAME FROM BANK_CODE BK WHERE BK.BANK_CODE = B.AI_CODE) ELSE (SELECT CC.CARD_NAME FROM CARD_CODE CC WHERE CC.CARD_CODE = B.AI_CODE) END AS aiCode ,CASE WHEN B.AI_SE = 'B' THEN '통장' WHEN B.CARD_TYPE = 'C' THEN '신용' ELSE '체크' END AS cardType FROM TB_HOME_LEDGER_INFO A LEFT JOIN TB_ACCOUNT_INFO B ON A.MEMBER_ID = B.MEMBER_ID AND A.AI_SEQ = B.AI_SEQ AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE A.MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND DATE_FORMAT(A.TRAN_DATE, '%Y-%m') = #{date} AND A.INOUT_TYPE = 'E' AND A.OVER_SPENDING_YN = 'Y' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.TRAN_DATE

/* UserStatisticsMapper.selectInoutList */ SELECT A.TRAN_DATE AS tranDate ,FORMAT(A.AMOUNT, 0) AS amount ,B.AI_NM AS aiNm ,CASE WHEN B.AI_SE = 'B' THEN '통장' ELSE '카드' END AS aiSe ,CASE WHEN A.INOUT_TYPE = 'I' THEN '수입' ELSE '지출' END AS inoutType ,CASE WHEN B.AI_SE = 'B' THEN (SELECT BK.BANK_NAME FROM BANK_CODE BK WHERE BK.BANK_CODE = B.AI_CODE) ELSE (SELECT CC.CARD_NAME FROM CARD_CODE CC WHERE CC.CARD_CODE = B.AI_CODE) END AS aiCode ,CASE WHEN B.AI_SE = 'B' THEN '통장' WHEN B.CARD_TYPE = 'C' THEN '신용' ELSE '체크' END AS cardType FROM TB_HOME_LEDGER_INFO A LEFT JOIN TB_ACCOUNT_INFO B ON A.MEMBER_ID = B.MEMBER_ID AND A.AI_SEQ = B.AI_SEQ AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE A.MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND DATE_FORMAT(A.TRAN_DATE, '%Y-%m') = #{date} AND A.INOUT_TYPE = #{inoutType} AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.TRAN_DATE
